CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2006 Dismissal
MINI MINUTES: Notice having been given and there being no appearance nor an objection filed. The court orders case dismissed pursuant to California Rules of Court Section 225. Proceedings reported by: Leticia Perez. (212)

Off Calendar Dec-05-2005 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Dec-08-2005 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jan-10-06 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This matter came regularly on calendar this day, by assignment from the Department of the Presiding Judge for Court Trial/Prove-Up.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Leticia Perez.
Richard Miller, Esq. for for Plaintiff: Jazquelyn L. Holmes, also present, was sworn and direct examined.
No appearance by the Defendants: Anthony Edward, Donna Serghesio and Jessica Boren.
Plaintiff indicated a possible settlement with Defendants: Serghesio and Boren, Defendant: Burke was served and remain in custoday at San Quentin and has not requested for any form of appearance.
After hearing the testimony and evidence presented, the Court taken the matter under submission, Trial brief submitted in court.
Counsel to prepare and submit a Blank Proposed Judgment.
Counsel requested in open court for a 24 hrs to brief on issue of seperate notice on Punitive Damages. The Court grants 48 hrs.
Matter is also set for CRC-225 on Jan. 10, 2006 in Dept. 212 at 10:00 A.M. for Dimissal of Defendants: Seghesio and Boren.
